scripts.watch: concurrently -n langium,tsc,ext -c magenta,blue,green "pnpm run langium:watch" "tsc -b tsconfig.build.json --watch" "pnpm --filter ./packages/extension run watch"
scripts.build: pnpm run langium:generate && tsc -b tsconfig.build.json && pnpm -r run build
scripts.build:clean: pnpm run clean && pnpm run build
